heading: Synonyms Examples
body:
The following examples use the `text` operator to search the
`plot` field in the `sample_mflix.movies` namespace. MongoDB Search returns
results based on the [Synonym](synonyms-ref) in the
[properly formatted](synonyms-coll-spec),
`synonymous_terms`, specified in the synonym mapping definition
of the index for the `sample_mflix.movies` collection.
